assets.name: lecture_10_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: This is the most useful frame for notes because the symmetry condition has just been completed and is more legible than in the earlier candidates, while the surrounding board context remains visible. It preserves the left-hand list structure and the central defining equation with less hand occlusion than the in-progress writing frames.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: but let's consider all psi ij's which are symmetric,

assets.name: lecture_10_figure_04.png
assets.rationale: This is the clearest and least occluded frame in the window. Susskind has moved far enough away that the central board content is unobstructed, and it preserves the useful representation-theory layout showing the product N times \bar N together with the indexed matrix object underneath.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: also a matrix psi i j

assets.name: lecture_10_figure_05.png
assets.rationale: This frame is the sharpest and most settled view of the board within the subtitle window. It preserves the full antisymmetric matrix layout on the right, the comparison item on the left, and the visible 2-plus-3 block structure, while Susskind is relatively still. Although he still occludes part of the middle, the mathematical organization is more complete and easier to reconstruct here than in the earlier frames.
